page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Simulation of rooted phylogenetic trees under a given Multitype Birth–Death (MTBD) model.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Treesimulator is a python package for simulation of transmission trees under a given Multitype Birth–Death (MTBD) model, with or without partner notification (PN).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Treesimulator is a python package for simulation of transmission trees under a given Multitype Birth–Death (MTBD) model, with or without partner notification (PN).
